creator: brentw@member.fsf.org
text:
While installing to Parallels virtual machine on iMac OS X the install is unable to find packages.  I selected "X Developer" as package to install.  I have installed this same configuration using 6.1-STABLE several times. This is the first time I have tried 6.2-BETA.  I can not say whether this is a problem with Parallels virtual machine or install disc.

Install media was downloaded 10/23/06.

Fix: 

I will attempt to burn to disk and install and/or attempt an install from "bootonly" and report problems if incountered.
